name: VTIL_SetNodeProperty
title: VTIL_SetNodeProperty
syntax: long VTIL_SetNodeProperty( char propertyName[], long propertyValue); // form 1
long VTIL_SetNodeProperty( dbNode vt, char propertyName[], long propertyValue); // form 2
long VTIL_SetNodeProperty( char propertyName[],char propertyValue[]); // form 3
long VTIL_SetNodeProperty( dbNode vt, char propertyName[], char propertyValue[]); // form 4
description: Changes an internal property of the node.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function

parameters.name: propertyName
parameters.description: Name of the property (see Properties of VT IL and Network Properties of VT IL)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
